steps.t: Braigiar has pointed you to a cache he believes is hidden in the Southern area of Fordirith. First, you should find a marker rune atop a small rounded…
Braigiar said the cache of weapons would be buried about sixty paces east of the rune marker, amid a jumble of large boulders.
Braigiar is at Echad Dagoras, north of the weapon-cache. You have discovered the Rangers' cache and dug up the weapons hidden there. You should return…
